mapper.select:
SELECT T.TEAM_IDX TEAM_IDX, T.TEAM_NAME TEAM_NAME, T.TEAM_MANAGER TEAM_MANAGER, T.TEAM_CONTENT TEAM_CONTENT, T.TEAM_LOCATION TEAM_LOCATION, T.TEAM_REGDATE TEAM_REGDATE, M.MEMBER_NAME MEMBER_NAME, L.LEAGUE_NAME LEAGUE_NAME FROM TEAM T JOIN MEMBER M ON T.TEAM_MANAGER = M.MEMBER_IDX LEFT JOIN TEAM_LEAGUE TL ON T.TEAM_IDX = TL.TEAM_IDX LEFT JOIN LEAGUE L ON TL.LEAGUE_IDX = L.LEAGUE_IDX
AND (T.TEAM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR T.TEAM_LOCATION LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY T.TEAM_IDX DESC

SELECT T.TEAM_IDX TEAM_IDX, T.TEAM_NAME TEAM_NAME, T.TEAM_MANAGER TEAM_MANAGER, T.TEAM_CONTENT TEAM_CONTENT, T.TEAM_LOCATION TEAM_LOCATION, T.TEAM_REGDATE TEAM_REGDATE, M.MEMBER_NAME MEMBER_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_TEAM MT WHERE MT.TEAM_IDX = T.TEAM_IDX AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 1) AS MEMBER_COUNT FROM TEAM T LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON T.TEAM_MANAGER = M.MEMBER_IDX WHERE T.TEAM_IDX = #{team_idx}
SELECT L.LEAGUE_NAME FROM TEAM_LEAGUE TL JOIN LEAGUE L ON TL.LEAGUE_IDX = L.LEAGUE_IDX WHERE TL.TEAM_IDX = #{team_idx} AND TL.JOIN_STATUS = 1

SELECT M.MEMBER_NAME MEMBER_NAME, M.MEMBER_IDX MEMBER_IDX, MT.POSITION POSITION, MT.BACK_NUM BACK_NUM, MT.ELITE ELITE FROM MEMBER_TEAM MT JOIN MEMBER M ON MT.MEMBER_IDX = M.MEMBER_IDX WHERE MT.TEAM_IDX = #{team_idx} AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 1
AND (M.MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR MT.POSITION LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY MT.BACK_NUM ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TEAM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TEAM (TEAM_IDX, TEAM_NAME, TEAM_MANAGER, TEAM_CONTENT, TEAM_LOCATION, TEAM_REGDATE) VALUES (#{team_idx}, #{team_name}, #{team_manager}, #{team_content}, #{team_location}, SYSDATE)
INSERT INTO MEMBER_TEAM (MEMBER_IDX, TEAM_IDX, JOIN_STATUS) VALUES (#{member_idx}, #{team_idx}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT M.MEMBER_NAME MEMBER_NAME, M.MEMBER_IDX MEMBER_IDX, MT.POSITION POSITION, MT.BACK_NUM BACK_NUM, MT.ELITE ELITE FROM MEMBER_TEAM MT JOIN MEMBER M ON MT.MEMBER_IDX = M.MEMBER_IDX WHERE MT.TEAM_IDX = #{team_idx} AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 0 ORDER BY MT.MEMBER_IDX ASC
